prompt: I want to delete ConditionalValue.ContextualResolver.resolve(). Show me every direct caller, then for each caller show its callers (depth 2). Identify which of those callers are in test files vs production code.
assertions: Resolves the exact function before tracing callers
Distinguishes test files from production files
Reports truncation metadata if the hierarchy was bounded
expected_output: A bounded depth-2 caller impact report with production/test classification.
